calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2004 Continued To Jan-14-05 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-23-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Nelson Meeks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jason Dunlap, who was sworn/examined
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Ibrahim Hadeed as follows:
Principal $11,484.44
Costs $375.50
for a total of $11,859.94
Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to this department.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Continued To Nov-23-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
